commands.review_summary:
The PR adds formatting/textMode handling to the CLI lazy channel sender and a regression asserting rendered Telegram HTML is forwarded as `parseMode: "HTML"`.

Reproducibility: yes. at source level: current main drops formatting/textMode in the CLI lazy sender while the Telegram adapter depends on `formatting.parseMode` to preserve pre-rendered HTML. I did not run a live Telegram cron job in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer labeling plus missing real Telegram proof and failing checks make this a human review/validation item, not an automated repair candidate.
